desc: A warm exploration of regional food cultures, capturing the heart of local kitchens, personal stories, and the emotional connections tied to recipes passed down through generations.

title: Taste Ki Gully
desc: Chef Smit Sagar travels through the aromatic lanes of various cities across India and brings you some of the most unique and delectable street food recipes.

title: Snack in the box
desc: In a quirky twist, snacking turns into an outrageous crime spree. Join the fun as friends navigate the chaos and hilarity that ensues from their munchies!

title: Gimme Chocolate
desc: Join Indian chocolatier Zeba Kohli as she hosts celebrities for fun chats and delicious dessert tastings in this delightful show filled with sweetness and spontaneity!

title: I Want To Bake Free
desc: The show explores the nuanced world of baking and simplifies the daunting aspects of baking for viewers. The show will feature an episode dedicated to baking recipes that can be tried by children.

title: Pickle Nation
desc: Pickle Nation explores the vibrant world of Indian pickles, meeting 10 unique communities passionate about their traditional 'Achars' and uncovering the rich stories behind their spicy obsessions.

title: Utsav - Thalis Of India
desc: Chef Kunal explores each region and unravels fascinating anecdotes about it's people, the regional delicacies, cooking and food-serving techniques. He believes there is a story behind every thali.

title: House Party Hits
desc: House Party Hits brings together popular Bollywood dance songs perfect for celebrations and fun evenings.

title: 100percent Veg
desc: Millions of people around the world are turning vegetarian. Being vegetarian is not just healthier but it's also a current trend. India is a global leader when it comes to vegetarian food.

title: Taste Ki Gully
desc: Chef Smit Sagar travels through the aromatic lanes of various cities across India and brings you some of the most unique and delectable street food recipes.

title: Ganga - The Soul Of India
desc: Gangaa tells the emotional journey of Ganga, who married as a child, and who grows into a strong, wise woman. Her life challenges outdated norms with courage, dignity, and unwavering spirit.
